texto: In regard to music, I just think that it's always best to have an attitude of being a perpetual student and always look to learn something new about music, because there's always something new to learn.
explicacao: Citação de David Sanborn sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “In regard to music, I just think that it's always best to have an attitude of being a perpetual s…” articula motivacao, music, inspiracional em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e inspiracional.

frase_original: In regard to music, I just think that it's always best to have an attitude of being a perpetual student and always look to learn something new about music, because there's always something new to learn.

texto: When you see the same familiar faces, it's nice when you get a chance to play with the same musicians. You start to develop this shorthand so everybody knows where you're at and where you're going, but then again, there are always surprises. But the more people are comfortable with the material, the more free you can be with the music.
explicacao: Orientação direta de David Sanborn sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “When you see the same familiar faces, it's nice when you get a chance to play with the same music…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, music, musicians, útil em momentos de musicians e people.

frase_original: When you see the same familiar faces, it's nice when you get a chance to play with the same musicians. You start to develop this shorthand so everybody knows where you're at and where you're going, but then again, there are always surprises. But the more people are comfortable with the material, the more free you can be with the music.

texto: Music is an expression of individuality; it's how you see the world. All art is, for that matter. You take how you experience the world, interpret it, and send it out there - express it - whether it's sculpture, dance or singing.
explicacao: Citação de David Sanborn sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Music is an expression of individuality; it's how you see the world. All art is, for that matter.…” articula reflexao, art, experience em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e experience.
